code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut token = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if string.len(token) > 0
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(token) > 0
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
